claim: `dryui init` produces a buildable SvelteKit project wired to @dryui/ui themes and app-shell recipe.
prompt: Run `bunx -y @dryui/cli init .` against an empty directory. Then ensure the resulting app builds and the default app-shell renders.

acceptance_checks.description: `dryui check` reports zero errors on the scaffolded project.
The scaffold imports at least one DryUI component from @dryui/ui.
The generated theme CSS declares every required --dry-* token family.
